overview: The Department of Real Estate (BRE) at Daffodil International University is the first department in Bangladesh to offer a four-year undergraduate program in Real Estate with majors in Marketing, Finance & Banking and Land Management.
eligibility: Students having a minimum 2.5 GPA both in Secondary School Certificate (SSC) and Higher Secondary Certificate (HSC) 12 class passed or any equivalent background with a minimum 'C' grade in English from any group may apply for admission.
labs: Building Maintenance and Compliance Management Lab
Material Innovation in Building Technology Lab
Real Estate Project and Construction Management Lab
Environmental Hazard and Risk Management Lab
curriculum_highlights: Principles of Housing and Land Development
Geographical Information System and Remote Sensing
Fundamentals of Property and Business Law
Real Estate Project and Construction Management
career_opportunities: Ministry of Housing and Public Works
Many Other Companies Related to Real Estate Business
facilities: Credit transfer and exchange program in foreign universities
intake: Spring: Jan-Apr | Summer: May-Aug | Fall: Sep-Dec
